meta.title: SkillPath Academy
meta.description: Learning platform for QA engineers, business analysts, and data analysts.

nav.quickTipText: Press Cmd/Ctrl + K to search lessons, missions, jobs, and admin entities.

hero.title: Launch your tech career with {highlight} and AI mentoring
hero.description: SkillPath Academy combines practical learning, progression systems, and career guidance in one premium workspace.

tracks.title: Role-focused tracks
tracks.description: QA, BA, DA, and PM paths built around real job requirements.

missions.title: Real-world missions
missions.description: Practice on scenarios that mirror actual product-team work.

aiMentor.title: AI mentor guidance
aiMentor.description: Personalised path, review feedback, and interview prep.

career.title: Career readiness score
career.description: Track your progress toward job-ready with clear metrics.

steps.title: Choose a career track
steps.description: Pick QA, BA, DA, or PM and get a clear roadmap with milestones.

steps.title: Complete interactive modules
steps.description: Learn through lessons, quizzes, mini challenges, and smart progress feedback.

steps.title: Solve real-world missions
steps.description: Practice in realistic scenarios that feel like actual product-team work.

steps.title: Prepare for interviews
steps.description: Get readiness insights, AI review, and role-focused mock interview support.

dashboard.title: Dashboard widgets
dashboard.description: Heatmap, radar, recommendations, and weekly quest cards.

trackCards.title: Track cards
trackCards.description: Progress, next module, and ETA in one glance.

missionCards.title: Mission cards
missionCards.description: Scenario, XP reward, and status-driven actions.

progressWidgets.title: Progress widgets
progressWidgets.description: Level growth, streak, and readiness insights.

stages.title: Beginner
stages.description: Set target role and baseline skills.

stages.title: Foundations
stages.description: Build core concepts across track modules.

stages.title: Job Ready
stages.description: Close remaining skill gaps and apply.

aiMentor.title: Personalised guidance from day one
aiMentor.description: Tell SkillPath your target role and weekly time. AI mentor builds a practical path and adapts it as you progress.

chat.text: I want to become a QA engineer.
Great goal. How many hours can you study each week?
Recommended path: QA Foundations → API Testing → Bug Tracker Simulation → Mock Interview.

missions.title: Practice with scenarios that mirror real teams

outcomes.title: What you will be able to do
outcomes.subtitle: Built around the skills that actually matter in QA, BA, and DA roles.
list: Write strong bug reports and acceptance criteria
Build SQL analyses and explain product metrics
Handle role-based scenarios before your first job
Prepare for interviews with AI mentor feedback

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: Best for local demo and personal exploration.

plans.name: Pro Learner
plans.description: Full access to tracks, missions, and AI guidance.

plans.name: Team Academy
plans.description: Builder workflows and analytics for cohorts.

cta.title: Build your skills. Grow your career.
cta.description: Start your learning journey today with role-based tracks, missions, and AI-powered feedback.

footer.tagline: Premium local-first EdTech workspace for QA, BA, and DA careers.

guest.title: Learn faster. Practice smarter. Get job ready.
guest.description: Local demo access for role-based learning flows with premium UI, AI guidance, and mission-based progression.

trackProgression.title: Track progression
trackProgression.description: Modules, quizzes, unlock logic, and XP-based growth.

realMissions.title: Real missions
realMissions.description: Apply skills in practical scenarios for QA, BA, and DA roles.

aiMentor.title: AI mentor
aiMentor.description: Get guidance, feedback, and personalized next actions.

member.title: Continue your learning command center
member.aiSupportDescription: Use mentor chat for module guidance and recovery plan suggestions.

hero.title: Welcome back, {name}
hero.description: Progressing through {track}. Keep this sprint focused.

empty.title: Dashboard data is empty
empty.description: No user data found yet. Sign in and complete onboarding, or import initial content.

auditLog.title: Audit Log
auditLog.description: All admin actions are recorded here. Showing the latest {count} of {total} events.

permissions.title: Permission Roles
permissions.description: Manage admin role assignments. Each role grants specific permissions within the Academy Studio.
permissions.error: Could not load permission roles. The database may be unavailable.

shared.title: Title
shared.deleteConfirm: Delete "{title}"? This also removes all lessons and progress.

list.title: Modules
list.description: Search, filter, and edit module metadata inline. Drag rows to reorder within a track.
list.emptyFiltered: Try changing the search query or track filter.
list.emptyDefault: No modules exist yet. Create the first one.
list.bulkDeleteConfirm:
Delete {count} {count, plural, one {module} other {modules}}?

This also removes all associated lessons and learner progress. This cannot be undone.

new.title: New Module
new.description: Create a new module and assign it to a track.
